issues.title: Losing 39.91% impression share to budget
issues.reasoning: You're losing 39.91% of impressions due to budget. $50/day isn't enough — ads stop showing partway through the day.
issues.action: Consider a modest budget increase or pause underperforming keywords.
issues.estimatedImpact: Recovering 39.91% lost impressions could proportionally increase conversions

issues.title: Very high CPA: $239.48
issues.action: Add negatives for non-converting terms, lower bids, tighten audience targeting.
issues.estimatedImpact: Reducing CPA frees budget for more conversions

issues.title: ROAS below breakeven: 0.49x
